query:
-- Reactivate 7 stale specialty-air projects with genuine active opportunity signals
-- Exclude ID:7 (Woodside Scarborough - completed) and ID:510033 (Barrow Island - cancelled/decommissioned)
UPDATE projects
SET 
  lifecycleStatus = 'active',
  suppressed = 0,
  suppressionReason = NULL,
  staleReason = NULL,
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE id IN (
  120007,  -- Chevron Australia Operations — NWS & Gorgon
  120234,  -- Crux Gas Field Development
  120232,  -- North West Shelf Extension Project
  8,       -- Shell Prelude FLNG Turnaround 2026
  120008,  -- Woodside NWS Subsea Tieback Program
  120230,  -- Barossa Gas Project
  4        -- BW Opal FPSO / Barossa LNG Commissioning
);

-- Suppress GE Frame 9 — generic inferred equipment signal only, no explicit PA/specialty-air package
UPDATE projects
SET
  suppressed = 1,
  suppressionReason = 'Generic inferred compressor signal only — control system upgrade project with no explicit PA/specialty-air package demand',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE id = 1110006;
